evals.prompt: Interview me before you build a scalable notification system.
evals.expected_output: An adaptive one-question-at-a-time interview that turns scalable and notification system into a confirmed intent.
assertions: States an intent hypothesis and calibrated confidence
Asks exactly one question at a time
Uses a concrete triggering example instead of accepting scalable
Separates desired outcome from the proposed system
Does not plan or implement before confirmation

evals.prompt: Grill me on my idea to replace our internal admin portal.
evals.expected_output: A neutral interview that resolves beneficiary, trigger, success, constraints, and scope before action.
assertions: Inspects available context before asking discoverable facts
Does not ask leading approval questions
Surfaces trade-offs and what fails without the replacement
Reflects and tests the user's terminology
Ends with a concise confirmation statement

evals.prompt: I need this API to be fast. Ask whatever you need before changing it.
evals.expected_output: A concise clarification sequence that connects fast to a workload, user-visible consequence, and measurable threshold.
assertions: Requests a concrete scenario or observed problem
Identifies the affected user and operation
